x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Dispatcher Workspace is where Now Assist FSM AI scheduling suggestions surface to dispatchers.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Activate FSM Configurable Dispatcher Workspace (sn_fsm_disp_wrkspc) via the ServiceNow Store. Configure workspace views for your dispatch team. Now Assist FSM AI scheduling recommendations surface in the Dispatcher Workspace.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_0e03a33acfd903108935fb251d851cae
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[Dispatcher Workspace is where Now Assist FSM AI scheduling suggestions surface to dispatchers.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>FSM Dispatcher Workspace Configuration</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var gr = new GlideRecord('sys_scope');
    gr.addQuery('scope', 'sn_fsm_disp_wrkspc');
    gr.addQuery('active', true);
    gr.setLimit(1);
    gr.query();
    var active = gr.next();

    if (active) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: 'FSM Configurable Dispatcher Workspace (sn_fsm_disp_wrkspc) is active',
            finding: 'FSM Dispatcher Workspace is active. Now Assist FSM AI scheduling recommendations and dispatch suggestions are visible to dispatchers.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: 'FSM Dispatcher Workspace (sn_fsm_disp_wrkspc) not found or inactive',
            finding: 'FSM Dispatcher Workspace is not active. Now Assist FSM AI scheduling recommendations are not visible to dispatchers without the Dispatcher Workspace.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>FIELD_SERVICE</module>
<number>CHK0006060</number>
<order>80</order>
<remediation_guidance>Activate FSM Configurable Dispatcher Workspace (sn_fsm_disp_wrkspc) via the ServiceNow Store. Configure workspace views for your dispatch team. Now Assist FSM AI scheduling recommendations surface in the Dispatcher Workspace.</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>0e03a33acfd903108935fb251d851cae</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
